steps.title: Use the fitted line
steps.content: The question asks for a predicted value, so use the line of best fit rather than a nearby scatterplot point.

steps.title: Read the predicted value
steps.content: At $x=2$, the line of best fit is just below $15$ on the $y$-axis, about $14.8$. The closest listed value is $15$. The answer is D.
